name: Soul Refining Sect Inheritance
description: Wang Lin inherits the Soul Refining Sect's soul-manipulation legacy. Heavy yin karma.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Soul Refining Sect Inheritance. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
